case_title: YONI ELISAUL GALO VS. LHO INC. DBA TAQUERIA LA IGUANA AZUL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-03-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF YONI ELISAUL GALO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER URIE VALASCO. DEFENDANT LHO INC. DBA TAQUERIA LA IGUANA AZUL IS NOT PRESENT. THE NON-COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY CLERK: R. SAHAJIAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
